title: What Is AI?
description: Let's explore how computers can become smart!

scenes.speech: AI is amazing, right? Let's explore it together!
scenes.title: Welcome to the World of AI!

scenes.speech: AI stands for Artificial Intelligence — computers that can think like humans!
scenes.title: AI = Artificial Intelligence
scenes.content: Artificial Intelligence makes it possible for computers to learn, think, and make decisions on their own.
scenes.highlight: AI = Computers that can learn on their own

scenes.speech: AI learns patterns by looking at a lot of data!
scenes.title: How AI Learns
scenes.content: Machine Learning is how AI learns from examples. More data means a smarter AI!

scenes.speech: The brain of AI is called a Neural Network — built from numbers!
scenes.title: Neural Networks = Digital Brain
scenes.content: Neural Networks copy how neurons in the human brain work. Millions of digital connections working together!

scenes.speech: Tools like ChatGPT and Claude became smart by learning from huge amounts of text!
scenes.title: Do You Know AI Chat?
scenes.content: Large language models (LLMs) like ChatGPT learn from trillions of words, then can answer questions and create content.
scenes.highlight: 📚 Lots of text → LLM → AI chat

scenes.speech: AI can also recognize photos and images — like super sharp eyes!
scenes.title: AI Image Recognition
scenes.content: AI can tell a cat photo from a dog photo, and even recognize faces. Your phone camera uses this!
scenes.highlight: 📸 Photo → AI analysis → 'This is a cat!'

scenes.speech: AI can also help make pictures, music, programs, and more!
scenes.title: Generative AI = Creative AI
scenes.content: Tools like Midjourney, DALL-E, and Suno AI can create brand-new artwork from your description!

scenes.speech: AI is already all around us — in phones, cars, and hospitals!
scenes.title: AI in Daily Life
scenes.content: YouTube recommendations, Instagram filters, Google Maps — all powered by AI! You use AI every single day.

scenes.speech: In the future, AI will help doctors, scientists, and even teachers!
scenes.title: The Future of AI
scenes.content: AI will keep advancing to help solve big problems. You could be the one building the next great AI!

scenes.speech: Now you know a lot more about AI. Try using it for something amazing!
scenes.title: Lesson Complete!
